name: Funding Circle SMB Marketplace Lending API
what_it_does: Funding Circle SMB marketplace lending REST API for partner platforms, banks, and fintechs to access small business term loans and working capital through Funding Circle's institutional lending marketplace. Enables AI agents to manage SMB loan application submission for embedded term loan automation, handle business credit assessment and decisioning for underwriting data automation, access loan offer generation and multi-offer presentation for lending product automation, retrieve loan origination and funding disbursement status for lending workflow automation, manage bank partnership and white-label lending for bank-fintech collaboration automation, handle loan servicing and repayment tracking for portfolio management automation, access credit bureau data integration for enhanced underwriting automation, retrieve SMB financial health monitoring for ongoing credit monitoring automation, manage partner referral and lead submission for distribution channel automation, and integrate Funding Circle with bank cores, accounting software, and CRM for end-to-end SMB lending partnership.
use_cases: Embedding term loans from bank partnership lending agents
Submitting SMB applications from fintech referral agents
Tracking loan funding from origination workflow agents
Monitoring repayments from loan servicing automation agents
not_for: Consumer personal lending (SMB business loans only)
Real estate investment lending (business operations only)
Revenue-based financing (Funding Circle offers term loans, not RBF)
best_when: A bank, fintech, or B2B platform wanting AI agents to offer SMB term loans through Funding Circle's lending marketplace, automate application submission, and manage loan origination workflows.
avoid_when: EQUAL CREDIT OPPORTUNITY ACT ADVERSE ACTION REQUIREMENTS (US): Automated SMB loan application processing via Funding Circle in US must comply with ECOA adverse action notice requirements; automated decline without adverse action notice within required timeframe creates ECOA violation. UK FCA CREDITWORTHINESS ASSESSMENT REQUIREMENTS: Funding Circle UK lending subject to FCA consumer credit regulations for sole trader applicants; automated credit assessment must include FCA-compliant creditworthiness assessment; automated lending to UK sole traders without proper creditworthiness assessment creates Consumer Duty compliance gap. INSTITUTIONAL INVESTOR AVAILABILITY FOR MARKETPLACE LENDING: Funding Circle's marketplace lending model depends on institutional investor capital availability; automated loan origination capacity may be constrained by investor allocation; automated lending pipeline that assumes unlimited origination capacity may face capacity constraints during investor risk-off periods.

auth.notes: Funding Circle uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication for partner integrations. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ with San Francisco office. Founded 2010 by Samir Desai, James Meekings, Andrew Mullinger, and Sam Hodges. Public (LSE: FCH). Products: SMB term loans (UK, US), FlexiPay (UK business credit card). $20B+ lent to 130,000+ businesses globally. Operates in UK and US (exited DE, NL, AU). FCA-authorized in UK. FDIC-insured deposits via bank partner in US. GDPR. Competes with iwoca, OnDeck, and Kabbage/KServicing for SMB lending.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — lending margin and origination fee
pricing.paid_tiers: Origination fee on loans funded; interest revenue share for partner programs; API access by commercial arrangement
pricing.notes: London UK. Public (LSE: FCH). Origination fee model. Partner revenue share. UK and US operations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; application and decision queries throttled; webhooks for application status, decision, and funding events

known_agent_gotchas: LOAN DECISION TURNAROUND TIME VARIABILITY: Funding Circle loan decisions range from automated instant decisions to multi-day manual underwriting review; automated lending pipeline must handle variable decision timelines; automated follow-up messaging that assumes same-day decision creates premature communication for applications in manual review

US vs UK PRODUCT FEATURE PARITY: Funding Circle US and UK have different product features and API endpoints; automated cross-market lending platform must maintain separate UK and US API configurations; US-designed automation workflows may not map directly to UK API endpoints due to product differences

EARLY REPAYMENT FEE CALCULATION IN AUTOMATED CASH MANAGEMENT: Funding Circle term loans may have early repayment fees; automated cash management that repays term loans early when excess cash is available must calculate net benefit after early repayment fee; automated early repayment without fee calculation may generate negative ROI if fee exceeds interest savings

BANK PARTNERSHIP WHITE-LABEL COMPLIANCE OWNERSHIP: White-label lending partnerships through Funding Circle create compliance responsibility questions; automated white-label lending must clarify regulatory compliance responsibility between bank partner and platform; automated deployment without compliance responsibility definition creates regulatory gap in FCA Consumer Duty or ECOA compliance

DOCUMENT COLLECTION ASYNC FOR UNDERWRITING: Funding Circle may require additional business documents (bank statements, tax returns) for underwriting; automated application submission does not guarantee automatic decisioning without document collection; automated pipeline must handle document request events and implement document collection workflow before decision
agent_readiness.security_notes: SMB marketplace lending. FCA, GDPR, ECOA. OAuth2/API key. UK/US. Business credit application and loan data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SMB lending marketplace. FCA, GDPR, ECOA. OAuth2/API key. UK/US. Business loan and credit data.
